title: System and Network Discovery Activity
description: Detects reconnaissance and discovery activity including network scanning and user enumeration.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
